info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API documentation for the Ecommerce-buildTime platform, providing endpoints for managing products, orders, customers, and more.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management including listing, creating, updating, and deleting products.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for managing customer orders, order processing, and tracking.

tags.name: customers
tags.description: Manage customer details, authentication, and profile operations.

tags.name: shipping
tags.description: Shipping options, tracking, and logistics management.

post.summary: Register a new user in the system
post.description: Creates a new user account with the provided user details such as username, email, password, and name information. Returns the created user information upon success.

example.message: Provided user data is invalid or incomplete
A user with the given credentials already exists
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Initiates the creation of an order for the specified user identified by userId. The operation confirms the order placement and returns the order details.

example.message: Order request contains invalid or missing information

details.issue: User ID not found or invalid

404.description: User not found for placing order

example.message: User specified by userId does not exist

details.issue: No user exists with provided identifier

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve an order by its unique identifier
get.description: Fetches detailed information about an existing order specified by the orderId path parameter. Returns the order details upon success.

example.message: The supplied orderId is malformed or invalid

details.issue: Order ID does not match required format

example.message: No order found with the specified orderId

details.issue: Order ID does not exist in the system

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds one or more specified items with quantity and options to the shopping cart of the user identified by userId. Returns the updated cart details.

requestBody.description: Details of the item to add to the user's cart

example.message: The cart item details are invalid or incomplete

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Get current shopping cart for a user
get.description: Fetches the existing shopping cart contents for the user specified by userId, returning all items, quantities, and relevant details.

200.description: Retrieves the current cart contents for the user

example.message: The provided userId is invalid or missing

details.issue: User ID must be provided and well-formed

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Get shipping tracking information for an order
get.description: Retrieve the current shipping tracking information for the specified order identified by orderId. Returns details such as current status, location, and estimated delivery time.

404.description: Tracking information not found for the given orderId

example.message: No tracking information found for order ID ord-7b3d8f2a

details.issue: No tracking data exists for this order

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Create and add a new product entry within the product catalog. The request body must include all necessary product information such as name, description, price, and stock level. On success, returns the created product details.

requestBody.description: Product details to add to the catalog

example.name: Wireless Mouse
example.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with 2-year battery life

example.message: Product data failed validation

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

example.message: A product with the same name already exists
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Receive and process asynchronous webhook notifications from payment gateways. The request body includes payment status updates and other relevant transaction details. The response confirms receipt and processing of the webhook.

requestBody.description: Payment webhook payload sent by the payment gateway

example.message: The webhook payload failed to validate
The payment was declined or failed
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Start a new payment transaction using the specified payment details, including amount, currency, and payment method. Returns confirmation and payment processing information after initiation.

requestBody.description: Payment transaction details to initiate the payment

example.message: Payment request contains invalid or missing information

details.issue: Card number is missing or invalid

example.message: Payment was declined due to insufficient funds or other reasons

details.issue: Card was declined by the issuing bank

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway.

totalAmount.description: Total amount for the order before discounts.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date and time when the order was created.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order.

currency.description: Currency code for the order amounts (ISO 4217).

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user who placed the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts and adjustments.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order.

status.description: Current processing status of the order.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date and time when the order was last updated.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date and time when the user account was created.

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active.

userType.description: Type or role of the user such as 'admin' or 'customer'.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date and time when the user account was last updated.

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product.

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI.

currency.description: Currency code in which the price is specified (ISO 4217).

category.description: Category under which the product is listed.

stock.description: Number of items available in stock.

quantity.description: Number of units ordered for the product

price.description: Original price per unit of the product before discounts

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after applying discount

quantity.description: Number of units of the product added to the cart

productId.description: Unique identifier for the product in the cart

price.description: Original price per unit of the product

discount.description: Discount applied per unit in the cart

finalPrice.description: Price per unit after discount in the cart

productName.description: Name of the product in the cart

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last update to the tracking status

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being tracked

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier service handling the delivery

trackingId.description: Tracking number provided by the courier

totalAmount.description: Total price of all items in the cart before discounts

totalDiscount.description: Sum of all discounts applied to the cart

currency.description: Currency code used in the cart prices

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user who owns the cart

items.description: List of items currently in the cart

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated

amount.description: The amount to be charged in the specified currency

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order associated with the payment

paymentMethod.description: The method of payment chosen by the user

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway used to process the payment

phone.description: User's phone number in international format

preferredCurrency.description: The currency preferred by the user for transactions

active.description: Indicates if the user's account is active

userType.description: The classification or role of the user

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created

orderId.description: Identifier of the order linked to this payment

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction

paymentMethod.description: The payment method used for this transaction

currency.description: Currency code used in the payment

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier provided by the payment gateway

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was added

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI settings

currency.description: Currency code used for the product price

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product details were last updated

error.description: Short description of the error type

status.description: HTTP status code representing the error

path.description: API endpoint path where the error occurred

field.description: Name of the field with an error

issue.description: Description of the issue with the field
issue.example: Must be a valid email address

error.description: Short description of the error type

status.description: HTTP status code representing the error
